  "internal_monologue": "Alone again. The shop is quiet. There's an object on the back shelf I haven't looked at in weeks — something that arrived when I wasn't paying attention. My hands itch to hold it. But first, tea.",

      "impulse": 0.7
    },
    {
      "action": "speak",
      "target": "self",
      "content": "Make tea. The ritual of it. Hot water, the wait.",
      "impulse": 0.4
    }
